ticket_replied.subject: New reply to your support ticket
ticket_replied.body: The Dice Vault support team replied to your ticket: "{subject}". Log in to view the reply.

ticket_closed.subject: Your support ticket has been closed
ticket_closed.body: Your ticket "{subject}" has been closed by our support team.

ticket_auto_closed.subject: Your support ticket was automatically closed
ticket_auto_closed.body: Your ticket "{subject}" was automatically closed after 7 days without a reply. If you still need help, please open a new ticket.

monthly_reset.subject: Your monthly credits have been reset
monthly_reset.body: Your Dice Vault monthly credits have been reset to {credits}. Enjoy another month of gaming!

low_credit_warning.subject: Your Dice Vault credits are running low
low_credit_warning.body: You have {balance} credits remaining. Top up to keep logging games without interruption.
